mod.name: Lms_Event
mod.author: VirrageS
mod.lib:
function doStoplmsEvent() if getStorage(configlmsEvent.storages.main) > 0 then local playerTable, creatureTable = {}, {}
for x = configlmsEvent.room.from.x, configlmsEvent.room.to.x do for y = configlmsEvent.room.from.y, configlmsEvent.room.to.y do local n, i = getTileInfo({x=x, y=y, z=configlmsEvent.room.from.z}).creatures, 1 if n ~= 0 then local v = getThingfromPos({x=x, y=y, z=configlmsEvent.room.from.z, stackpos=i}).uid while v ~= 0 do if isPlayer(v) then table.insert(playerTable, v) if n == #playerTable then break end elseif isMonster(v) then table.insert(creatureTable, v) if n == #creatureTable then break end end i = i + 1 v = getThingfromPos({x=x, y=y, z=configlmsEvent.room.from.z, stackpos=i}).uid end end end end
if #playerTable > 1 then table.sort(playerTable, function(a, b) return (getCreatureStorage(a, configlmsEvent.storages.kills)) > (getCreatureStorage(b, configlmsEvent.storages.kills)) end)
local prize = math.random(#configlmsEvent.rewards)
doTeleportThing(playerTable[1], getTownTemplePosition(getPlayerTown(playerTable[1]))) doCreatureSetStorage(playerTable[1], configlmsEvent.storages.kills, 0) doPlayerAddItem(playerTable[1], configlmsEvent.rewards[prize], 1) doPlayerAddItem(playerTable[1], 10553, 3) doPlayerAddItem(playerTable[1], 2300, 1) doCreatureAddHealth(playerTable[1], getCreatureMaxHealth(playerTable[1]) - getCreatureHealth(playerTable[1])) doCreatureAddMana(playerTable[1], getCreatureMaxMana(playerTable[1]) - getCreatureMana(playerTable[1])) doPlayerSendTextMessage(playerTable[1], MESSAGE_EVENT_ADVANCE, 'You win! You have received '..getItemNameById(configlmsEvent.rewards[prize])..' as reward.') doBroadcastMessage('lms Plague Attack has finished. The winner is '..getCreatureName(playerTable[1])..'. Congratulations!') doSetStorage(configlmsEvent.storages.main, -1)
db.query("INSERT INTO `events` (`event_name`, `winner_name`, `won_item`, `time_win`) VALUES (\"lms\", \"" .. getCreatureName(playerTable[1]) .. "\", \"" .. getItemNameById(configlmsEvent.rewards[prize]) .. "\", " .. getStorage(configlmsEvent.storages.countEvent) ..");")
for i = 2, #playerTable do doCreatureAddHealth(playerTable[i], getCreatureMaxHealth(playerTable[i]) - getCreatureHealth(playerTable[i])) doCreatureAddMana(playerTable[i], getCreatureMaxMana(playerTable[i]) - getCreatureMana(playerTable[i])) doTeleportThing(playerTable[i], getTownTemplePosition(getPlayerTown(playerTable[i]))) doPlayerSendTextMessage(playerTable[i], MESSAGE_EVENT_ADVANCE, 'You loss.') doSendMagicEffect(getThingPos(playerTable[i]), CONST_ME_STUN) doCreatureSetStorage(playerTable[i], configlmsEvent.storages.kills, 0) end
for i = 1, #creatureTable do if isMonster(creatureTable[i]) then doRemoveCreature(creatureTable[i]) end end
doSetStorage(configlmsEvent.storages.countEvent, getStorage(configlmsEvent.storages.countEvent) + 1) elseif #playerTable == 0 then for i = 1, #creatureTable do if isMonster(creatureTable[i]) then doRemoveCreature(creatureTable[i]) end end
doBroadcastMessage('No one win in lms Plague Attack.') doSetStorage(configlmsEvent.storages.main, -1) doSetStorage(configlmsEvent.storages.countEvent, getStorage(configlmsEvent.storages.countEvent) + 1) end end end
function doStartlmsEvent() doSetStorage(configlmsEvent.storages.joining, -1)
if configlmsEvent.players.min <= doCountPlayerslmsEvent() then for _, cid in ipairs(getPlayersOnline()) do if getCreatureStorage(cid, configlmsEvent.storages.player) > 0 then doCreatureSetStorage(cid, configlmsEvent.storages.player, -1) doTeleportThing(cid, configlmsEvent.position) doCreatureSetNoMove(cid, false) doRemoveCondition(cid, CONDITION_INFIGHT)
doPlayerSendTextMessage(cid, MESSAGE_EVENT_ADVANCE, 'Get ready. Last Man Standing Event starts in '..configlmsEvent.startEvent..' seconds.')
end end
addEvent(doSetStorage, configlmsEvent.startEvent * 1000, configlmsEvent.storages.main, 1) addEvent(doStoplmsEvent, configlmsEvent.stopEvent * 1000) addEvent(doRepeatChecklmsEvent, configlmsEvent.startEvent * 1000 + 2000)
doBroadcastMessage('Last Man Standing Event has started. LET\'S GO!') else for _, cid in ipairs(getPlayersOnline()) do if getCreatureStorage(cid, configlmsEvent.storages.player) > 0 then doCreatureSetNoMove(cid, false) doRemoveCondition(cid, CONDITION_INFIGHT) end end
doBroadcastMessage('Last Man Standing Event hasn\'t started beacuse there not were enough players.') end end
function doRepeatChecklmsEvent() if getStorage(configlmsEvent.storages.main) > 0 then local playerTable, creatureTable, xTable, yTable = {}, {}, {}, {}
for x = configlmsEvent.room.from.x, configlmsEvent.room.to.x do for y = configlmsEvent.room.from.y, configlmsEvent.room.to.y do local n, i = getTileInfo({x=x, y=y, z=configlmsEvent.room.to.z}).creatures, 1 if n ~= 0 then local v = getThingfromPos({x=x, y=y, z=configlmsEvent.room.to.z, stackpos=i}).uid while v ~= 0 do if isPlayer(v) then table.insert(playerTable, v) if n == #playerTable then break end elseif isMonster(v) then table.insert(creatureTable, v) if n == #creatureTable then break end end i = i + 1 v = getThingfromPos({x=x, y=y, z=configlmsEvent.room.to.z, stackpos=i}).uid end end
table.insert(xTable, x) table.insert(yTable, y) end end
if #playerTable == 1 then local prize = math.random(#configlmsEvent.rewards)
addEvent(doTeleportThing, 200, playerTable[1], getTownTemplePosition(getPlayerTown(playerTable[1])), true) doPlayerAddItem(playerTable[1], configlmsEvent.rewards[prize], 1) doPlayerAddItem(playerTable[1], 10553, 3) doPlayerAddItem(playerTable[1], 2300, 1) doCreatureSetStorage(playerTable[1], configlmsEvent.storages.kills, 0) doCreatureAddHealth(playerTable[1], getCreatureMaxHealth(playerTable[1]) - getCreatureHealth(playerTable[1])) doCreatureAddMana(playerTable[1], getCreatureMaxMana(playerTable[1]) - getCreatureMana(playerTable[1])) doPlayerSendTextMessage(playerTable[1], MESSAGE_EVENT_ADVANCE, 'You win! You have received '..getItemNameById(configlmsEvent.rewards[prize])..' as reward.') doBroadcastMessage('lms Plague Attack has finished. The winner is '..getCreatureName(playerTable[1])..'. Congratulations.') db.query("INSERT INTO `events` (`event_name`, `winner_name`, `won_item`, `time_win`) VALUES (\"lms\", \"" .. getCreatureName(playerTable[1]) .. "\", \""..getItemNameById(configlmsEvent.rewards[prize]).."\", "..getStorage(configlmsEvent.storages.countEvent)..");")
for i = 1, #creatureTable do if isMonster(creatureTable[i]) then doRemoveCreature(creatureTable[i]) end end
doSetStorage(configlmsEvent.storages.main, -1) doSetStorage(configlmsEvent.storages.countEvent, getStorage(configlmsEvent.storages.countEvent) + 1) return elseif #playerTable == 0 then for i = 1, #creatureTable do if isMonster(creatureTable[i]) then doRemoveCreature(creatureTable[i]) end end
doBroadcastMessage('No one win in lms Plague Attack.') doSetStorage(configlmsEvent.storages.main, -1)
doSetStorage(configlmsEvent.storages.countEvent, getStorage(configlmsEvent.storages.countEvent) + 1) return end
local pos = {x=xTable[math.random(#xTable)], y=yTable[math.random(#yTable)], z=7} for i = 1, configlmsEvent.amountCreatingMonsters do doCreateMonster(configlmsEvent.monsters[math.random(#configlmsEvent.monsters)], pos, false, false, false) doSendMagicEffect(pos, CONST_ME_BATS) end
addEvent(doRepeatChecklmsEvent, configlmsEvent.spawnDelay) end end
function doCountPlayerslmsEvent() local x = 0 for _, cid in ipairs(getPlayersOnline()) do if getCreatureStorage(cid, configlmsEvent.storages.player) > 0 then x = x + 1 end end return x end
function doStartCountinglmsEvent(x) if configlmsEvent.delayTime-x > 0 then doBroadcastMessage('Last Man Standing Event is going to start in '..configlmsEvent.delayTime-x..' minutes. You can join to the event by saying "!lms join".') addEvent(doStartCountinglmsEvent, 60*1000, x+1) end end
mod.talkaction:
domodlib("config_lms_event")
function onSay(cid, words, param) if getStorage(configlmsEvent.storages.joining) ~= 1 then return doPlayerSendCancel(cid, 'Last Man Standing Event hasn\'t started yet.') elseif param == '' then return doPlayerSendCancel(cid, 'Command param required (say: "!lms join" or "!lms leave.").') elseif getPlayerLevel(cid) < configlmsEvent.players.minLevel then return doPlayerSendCancel(cid, 'You can\'t join to the event if you don\'t have a require '..configlmsEvent.players.minLevel..' level.') elseif getTileInfo(getThingPos(cid)).protection ~= true then return doPlayerSendCancel(cid, 'You can\'t join to the event if you aren\'t in protection zone.') elseif exhaustion.check(cid, configlmsEvent.storages.exhaust) ~= false then return doPlayerSendCancel(cid, 'You must wait '..exhaustion.get(cid, configlmsEvent.storages.exhaust)..' seconds to use this command again.') end
if param == 'join' then if getCreatureStorage(cid, configlmsEvent.storages.player) > 0 then return doPlayerSendCancel(cid, 'You have arleady joined to event. Wait patiently for start.') elseif doCountPlayerslmsEvent() == configlmsEvent.players.max then return doPlayerSendCancel(cid, 'Max players in the event have been reached.') end
doCreatureSetNoMove(cid, true) doPlayerPopupFYI(cid, configlmsEvent.text) doCreatureSetStorage(cid, configlmsEvent.storages.player, 1) doAddCondition(cid, createConditionObject(CONDITION_INFIGHT, -1)) doPlayerSendTextMessage(cid, MESSAGE_EVENT_ADVANCE, 'You have joined to Last Man Standing Event . You can\'t move until event don\'t start. Wait patiently for the event start.') doPlayerSendTextMessage(cid, MESSAGE_EVENT_ORANGE, 'You have joined to Last Man Standing Event .') elseif param == 'leave' then if getCreatureStorage(cid, configlmsEvent.storages.player) <= 0 then return doPlayerSendCancel(cid, 'You can\'t leave from the event if you don\'t join.') end
doCreatureSetNoMove(cid, false) doCreatureSetStorage(cid, configlmsEvent.storages.player, -1) doRemoveCondition(cid, CONDITION_INFIGHT) doPlayerSendTextMessage(cid, MESSAGE_EVENT_ORANGE, 'You have left from the Last Man Standing Event .') end
exhaustion.set(cid, configlmsEvent.storages.exhaust, 5) return true end

domodlib("config_lms_event") domodlib("lib_lms_event")
function onSay(cid, words, param) if getStorage(configlmsEvent.storages.main) > 0 then return doPlayerSendCancel(cid, 'Last Man Standing Event is already running.') end
doStartCountinglmsEvent(0)
for _, pid in ipairs(getPlayersOnline()) do if getCreatureStorage(pid, configlmsEvent.storages.player) > 0 then doCreatureSetStorage(pid, configlmsEvent.storages.player, -1) doTeleportThing(pid, getTownTemplePosition(getPlayerTown(pid)), true) doCreatureSetStorage(pid, configlmsEvent.storages.kills, 0) end end
doSetStorage(configlmsEvent.storages.joining, 1) addEvent(doStartlmsEvent, configlmsEvent.delayTime * 60 * 1000) return true end

domodlib("config_lms_event") domodlib("lib_lms_event")
function onSay(cid, words, param) if getStorage(configlmsEvent.storages.main) > 0 then doStoplmsEvent() else doPlayerSendCancel(cid, 'You can not do it if Last Man Standing Event is not enabled.') end return true end
mod.globalevent:
domodlib("config_lms_event") domodlib("lib_lms_event")
local daysOpen = {} for k, v in pairs(configlmsEvent.days) do table.insert(daysOpen, k) end
function onThink(interval) if isInArray(daysOpen, os.date('%A')) then if isInArray(configlmsEvent.days[os.date('%A')], os.date('%X', os.time())) then if getStorage(configlmsEvent.storages.joining) ~= 1 then doStartCountinglmsEvent(0)
for _, pid in ipairs(getPlayersOnline()) do if getCreatureStorage(pid, configlmsEvent.storages.player) > 0 then doCreatureSetStorage(pid, configlmsEvent.storages.player, -1) doTeleportThing(pid, getTownTemplePosition(getPlayerTown(pid)), true) doCreatureSetStorage(pid, configlmsEvent.storages.kills, 0) end end
doSetStorage(configlmsEvent.storages.joining, 1) addEvent(doStartlmsEvent, configlmsEvent.delayTime * 60 * 1000) end end end return true end
mod.event:
domodlib("config_lms_event")
function onStatsChange(cid, attacker, type, combat, value) if type == 1 and getCreatureHealth(cid) <= value then if isInRange(getThingPos(cid), configlmsEvent.room.from, configlmsEvent.room.to) then if isPlayer(cid) then doCreatureAddHealth(cid, getCreatureMaxHealth(cid) - getCreatureHealth(cid)) doCreatureAddMana(cid, getCreatureMaxMana(cid) - getCreatureMana(cid)) doTeleportThing(cid, getTownTemplePosition(getPlayerTown(cid))) doPlayerSendTextMessage(cid, MESSAGE_EVENT_ORANGE, 'You loss due to attack.')
doSendAnimatedText(getThingPos(cid), value, TEXTCOLOR_RED) doSendMagicEffect(getThingPos(cid), CONST_ME_TELEPORT) doCreatureSetStorage(cid, configlmsEvent.storages.kills, 0) return false end end elseif configlmsEvent.players.pvpEnabled ~= true and isInArray({1,3}, type) and isPlayer(attacker) and isPlayer(cid) then if isInRange(getThingPos(cid), configlmsEvent.room.from, configlmsEvent.room.to) then return false end end return true end

domodlib("config_lms_event")
function onKill(cid, target, damage, flags) if isInRange(getThingPos(cid), configlmsEvent.room.from, configlmsEvent.room.to) then if isInArray(configlmsEvent.monsters, getCreatureName(target)) then doCreatureSetStorage(cid, configlmsEvent.storages.kills, math.max(0, getCreatureStorage(cid, configlmsEvent.storages.kills) + 1)) end end return true end

domodlib("config_lms_event")
function onLogin(cid) if getCreatureStorage(cid, configlmsEvent.storages.player) > 0 then doCreatureSetStorage(cid, configlmsEvent.storages.player, -1) doTeleportThing(cid, getTownTemplePosition(getPlayerTown(cid)), true) doCreatureSetNoMove(cid, false) doRemoveCondition(cid, CONDITION_INFIGHT) doCreatureSetStorage(cid, configlmsEvent.storages.player.kills, 0) end
registerCreatureEvent(cid, 'lms_Event_Dead') registerCreatureEvent(cid, 'lms_Event_Kill') return true end
mod.globalevent:
domodlib("config_lms_event")
function onStartup() doSetStorage(configlmsEvent.storages.main, -1) doSetStorage(configlmsEvent.storages.joining, -1) return true end
